definitions: The later part of the Stone Age, when ground or polished stone weapons and implements prevailed.
The period in the development of human technology, beginning about 10,200 BC in some parts of the Middle East, and later in other parts of the world, and ending between 4,500 and 2,000 BC.
examples: The Neolithic saw the rise of agriculture.
Many Neolithic artifacts have been discovered.
The transition to the Neolithic was significant.
